description: Per-page rich SEO content enrichment progress for the Empora for WooCommerce documentation site. Resumable across sessions. Follows ~/.claude/rules/seo-aeo-ranking.md (§13).
currentSession: Initial site build — all baseline pages authored with real, accurate content (no thin/templated pages).
categoryStrategy: Docs site launched fully populated. Future batches add long-tail per-module guides (one batch per module group from modules/overview), each with definition-first intro, use cases, how-it-works, examples, FAQ, tips, distinct title + meta.

batches.notes: Authored from the real plugin readme.txt, the Laravel routes/api.php, and the wp-plugin module registry (90+ modules). API + License API endpoints verified against actual code. Privacy page mirrors the plugin's honest data-handling disclosure. No fabricated features.

nextBatchSuggestion.rationale: Highest long-tail SEO value: dedicated guides for high-demand modules (Subscriptions, Advanced Shipping, Gift Cards configuration, Multi-Currency, Email Automation, Bulk Edit, Import/Export).
nextBatchSuggestion.verifyBeforeUse: Read the matching module under apps/wp-plugin/includes/Modules/<Module> in the app repo so each guide is accurate to the real settings + behaviour.

qualityGates: 800+ unique words per page; no shared boilerplate across pages
Distinct title + meta description per page
Honest framing — what each module does and does NOT do
yarn typecheck + yarn build clean before commit
Accurate to real code — verify against the app repo before writing
